operating_state: Total revenues increased to $1.2 billion driven by rental revenue growth from positive rent change on rollover and contractual increases. Real Estate Operations NOI rose to $800 million primarily from rental rate growth and development completions. Strategic Capital NOI increased to $82 million from higher asset management fees driven by property valuation increases. Portfolio occupancy remained strong at 97.4% with significant leasing activity.
cost_structure: Rental expenses remained stable while G&A expenses decreased from prior period. Strategic Capital expenses increased due to higher compensation costs. The company capitalized development-related G&A expenses representing approximately one-quarter of total salaries and related costs.
material_events: Completed $1.8 billion of senior note issuances with weighted average interest rate of 1.1% and 9-year term across multiple tranches. Generated $1.7 billion in net proceeds from property contributions to European co-investment ventures and dispositions of non-strategic assets, realizing substantial net gains. Thomas Olinger announced retirement as CFO with Timothy Arndt appointed as successor. Stabilized development buildings totaling 3 million square feet with strong estimated margins.
macro_exposures: Monitoring the war in Ukraine and global events but have not observed material business impact to date. Exposed to foreign currency fluctuations through investments in multiple currencies, mitigated through co-investment venture structures and functional currency borrowing. Construction cost inflation that began in 2021 continued into the quarter, though procurement capabilities have minimized development impact.
forward_outlook: Expects continued strong demand driven by e-commerce growth, supply chain repositioning, and inventory rebuilding with significant net effective lease mark-to-market providing organic growth potential. Development pipeline includes substantial TEI potential from global land bank. Strategic Capital business positioned for growth through higher asset valuations driving increased asset management fees and potential promote revenues.
uncertainty_profile: Standard forward-looking statement risks including economic and political conditions, interest rate changes, competition, development cost increases, REIT status maintenance, financing availability, co-investment venture risks, international operations including currency risks, environmental uncertainties, and pandemic effects. The company maintains investments in unconsolidated co-investment ventures with associated third-party debt.
